ddls:
CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the startup */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the startup's website */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue_annual" REAL /* Annual revenue in USD */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Development stage of the startup */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the startup belongs to */,
  "sub_vertical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-vertical the startup operates in */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the startup is located */,
  "date_founded" TEXT /* Date the startup was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_sub_vertical_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_vertical_id") REFERENCES sub_verticals ("sub_vertical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., VC, Angel) */,
  "portfolio_size" INTEGER /* Number of startups in the portfolio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup the investment was made in */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who made the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "valuation_post_investment" REAL /* Valuation of the startup post-investment in USD */,
  "equity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of equity acquired */,
  "round_lead" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the investor led the funding round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_verticals" (
  "sub_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-vertical */,
  "sub_vertical_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-vertical */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sub-vertical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_vertical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "investment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_type_id")
)
column_names: ID of the industry the startup belongs to
ID of the sub-vertical the startup operates in
ID of the city where the startup is located
Number of startups in the portfolio
ID of the startup the investment was made in
ID of the investor who made the investment
Amount of the investment in USD
Valuation of the startup post-investment in USD
Flag indicating if the investor led the funding round
Country where the city is located
Unique identifier for each investment type
Brief description of the investment type
